code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = -1
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_space = false
  if i == n
    is_space = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        is_space = true
      end
    when None
      is_space = true
    end
  end
  if is_space
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut acc = 0
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    acc = acc + v
    if j == 0
      out = "#{acc}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{acc}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
